PLAT_Notes: Portal requires registration/login as evidenced by Register/Login buttons

moderators.language_notes: Multiple regional language options available via dropdown selector

evidence.API_evidence: Qantas NDC (New Distribution Capability) mentioned as technology for airline retailing, booking, and servicing for agents
evidence.SDK_evidence: No SDK documentation found in accessible content
evidence.language_evidence: Language selector shows multiple regions: Africa/Europe/Indian Subcontinent/Middle East, Asia, Australia, Canada, China, Hong Kong, Japan, New Zealand, Rest of World, United Kingdom, United States - all in English

coding_notes: Most pages returned ERR_FAILED indicating restricted access. Only main portal page accessible. API=1 based on NDC technology mentioned. STAN=1 for NDC standard. ROLE=1 due to registration/login requirement implying access control. OPEN=1 as registration appears to be self-service (Register button visible). COM_help_support=1 based on Help section in navigation. COM_FAQ=1 based on FAQs link in footer.
